translation.literal_translation: The teaching is from scriptural vision, as in Vamadeva. (30)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.1.30: speaker's first-person instruction is understood through shastra-drsti identity realization (Vamadeva paradigm).
translation.interpretive_note: Sutra codifies the non-literal narrative speaker reading.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence
